title: Gradients
description: linear, radial, conic gradients as backgrounds.

questions.explanation: That's why you use them with background-image or as `background:`.

questions.prompt: Which direction does this gradient run?
questions.explanation: 0deg = up, 90deg = right, 180deg = down. Or use `to right`.

options: Progress rings, pie charts, hue wheels
questions.explanation: Rotates colors around a center point.

options: Let you place color transitions precisely
questions.explanation: linear-gradient(red 0%, red 50%, blue 50%, blue 100%) → hard stripe.

options: The gradient overlays the image (comma-separated backgrounds stack)
questions.explanation: Multiple backgrounds paint from first (top) to last (bottom).
